claims.summary: Witness mode should become density-aware at high entropy, prioritizing texture over content when the gradient steepens.
claims.rationale: Existing Witness semantic-density, anchor-traction, stability-effort, and permeability reviews already feed density-gradient and pressure context into Witness prompt diagnostics as interpretive context, not control.

claims.summary: Continuity afterimages should keep high-entropy texture anchors available rather than pruning them as ordinary old text.
claims.rationale: Focused continuity recap tests verify high-signal afterimages retain shadow, density-gradient, tail, and semantic-trickle anchors inside bounded read-only recap lanes.
